attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.OBJ_STATUS_CHANGE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.OBJECT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.OBJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.STATUS_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.NEW_PROJECT_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.NEW_PROJECT_SYSTEM_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.OLD_PROJECT_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.OLD_PROJECT_SYSTEM_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.CHANGE_COMMENT, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES,
 (
 select OBJ_STATUS_CHANGE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES
 minus
 select OBJ_STATUS_CHANGE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.OBJ_STATUS_CHANGE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.OBJ_STATUS_CHANGE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_OBJ_STATUS_CHANGES)
